message:
feat(demo): refactor help overlay, add Esc dismiss, and update snapshots

Help overlay refactor (chrome.rs):
- Extract build_help_overlay_hints() from render_help_overlay() to separate
  hint construction from rendering, enabling testability and reuse
- Add "Esc — Dismiss top overlay" to global keybindings (View category)
- Render function now calls the builder and passes hints to KeybindingHints

CLI help text (cli.rs):
- Add "Esc — Dismiss top overlay" to HELP_TEXT keybindings section
- Fix "Shift-Tab" → "Shift+Tab" for consistency with other key notation
- Add test asserting Esc/Dismiss appear in help text

Screen snapshot tests (screen_snapshots.rs):
- Add new test cases for per-screen help overlays: app_help_overlay_80x24,
  app_help_overlay_advanced_text_editor (80x24 and 120x40),
  app_help_overlay_mermaid_mega_showcase (80x24 and 120x40)

Update all affected insta snapshots to reflect VS16 width changes and
the new Esc keybinding in help overlay panels.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
